title: Mabor 6PCS Mechanical Pencil Set, Cute Mechanical Pencils 0.5 mm Aesthetic Artist Retractable Mechanical Pencils for Writing Drawing Sketching for School or Office Supplies

Value Automatic Pencil Set: Delicate mechanical pencil set contains 6 drawing pencils with erasers on top. Enough to meet your daily use and replacement needs, you can share with your classmates or classmates

Great Gift Reward: Nice barrel and good writing results make 0.5 mechanical pencils one of the most popular gift pencils for back-to-school, friends, classroom rewards, holiday gifts, especially for women or girls
description: Our automatic pencils come in 6 macaron colors to add a touch of fun and creativity to your writing or drawing experience.
